heading: Acceptance of donations of animals
label: 1976 Acceptance of donations of animals
notes: CodificationSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2005, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Capitol Police may accept the donation of animals to be used in the canine units of the Capitol Police.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2005 and each fiscal year thereafter.
